Stuttgart, 1975

911 Turbo

Paint

Stuttgart, 1975

Porsche
911 Turbo

The car that rewrote the rules. Raw, unfiltered, and utterly uncompromising.

0 Horsepower
0 0 – 100 km/h
0 Top km/h
Scroll

01 — Power

Force
without
apology.

A turbocharged flat-six delivering 260 bhp — the most powerful production Porsche of its era. The whale-tail spoiler wasn't decoration. It was necessity.

02 — Design

Form
follows
function.

Every curve, duct, and flare exists for a reason. Wide rear arches to accommodate the staggered Pirelli rubber. A silhouette so iconic, fifty years haven't dulled it.

03 — Heritage

Born from
legend.

The 930 became the foundation for every Turbo that followed. Its lineage runs through every modern 911 — proof that greatness, once achieved, compounds.

The Original
Supercar.

1975 — Forever.
